warning: The 14,969 current items belong to separate endpoints and datasets: 917 Herlev grade images, 4,049 SIPaKMeD KOIL cells, and 10,003 CRIC grade cells. They must not be presented as one training cohort, independent patients, or ThinPrep images. Candidate datasets remain excluded.

records.name: Herlev Pap Smear Dataset
records.current_use: Four-class grade development, held-out evaluation, and five-fold cross-validation

records.name: SIPaKMeD
records.modality: Conventional Pap, cropped cells from 966 source clusters
records.current_use: Independent KOIL model development and source-cluster-disjoint locked testing

records.name: CCCID v2
records.current_use: Positive-only external KOIL challenge and public morphology reference

records.name: CRIC Cervix Classification
records.current_use: Four-grade research development and five-fold parent-image-disjoint out-of-fold evaluation on 10,003 directly supported NILM/LSIL/HSIL/SCC cells; 80 cells are also displayed as a visual reference atlas

records.name: Liquid-based cytology multi-class dataset
records.current_use: Candidate for licensing, patient-split, label, and domain review; not downloaded into current evidence

records.name: Pap-smear cervical cytology image dataset
records.current_use: Candidate for provenance, patient-level split, quality, and label review

records.name: HiCervix
records.current_use: Restricted-access candidate; institutional access and governance required

records.name: APCEM-Enhanced Cervical Cytology
records.modality: Enhanced Pap images, six Bethesda categories
records.current_use: Candidate only; original-image provenance and enhancement effects require review

records.name: Cx22
records.modality: Overlapping cervical-cell fields with instance labels
records.current_use: Candidate for future segmentation research; not a current classification endpoint

records.name: CCAgT
records.modality: AgNOR-stained cervical cells with detection annotations
records.current_use: Out-of-scope staining domain; catalogued for future detection research only

records.name: Brown Multicellular ThinPrep (BMT)
records.modality: ThinPrep multicellular fields, NILM / LSIL / HSIL
records.current_use: Strong candidate for ThinPrep domain training and external grade evaluation. HPV testing helped confirm source slide identities, but patient-linked HPV results are not exposed in the public image release.

records.name: Large annotated ThinPrep cytology dataset
records.current_use: Candidate for field-level detection and segmentation after slide-disjoint split review; no public molecular HPV endpoint is documented.

records.name: NCI HPV Persistence and Progression (PaP) Cohort
records.modality: Residual cervical specimens linked to cytology, histology, and HPV assays
records.current_use: Scientifically relevant paired HPV cohort requiring investigator collaboration, governance, and confirmation that suitable digitized cytology images can be produced or accessed. It is not a public image download.

records.name: Swedish Cervical Screening Cohort
records.modality: Registry and biobank linkage across HPV, cytology, and histopathology
records.current_use: Potential institutional validation partnership. Public downloadable, patient-linked digital cytology images are not supplied; ethics, data access, and imaging agreements are required.

records.name: HyCervix hyperspectral cohort
records.modality: In-vivo hyperspectral colposcopy, not Pap or ThinPrep microscopy
records.current_use: Useful only for a separate hardware-specific research track. It cannot train the current cytology upload model because the acquisition modality and anatomical scale are different.
